title: 6L Live PlmCasX Expression & Purification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"vt0m","text":"This protocol describes methods to express and purify PlmCasX plasmids.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Set up pre-culture by either transforming plasmid into Rosetta cells or using a small amount from a glycerol stock (steps found below). Perform all steps aseptically, next to a Bunsen burner.
Add 200 mL, LB broth to a 500 ml baffled Erlenmeyer flask.
Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 milligram per liter (mg/L) (add 200 µL of 50 milligram per milliliter (mg/mL) Ampicillin).
Add the entire tube of transformed cells to flask.
Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .
Locate 6 glass or plastic baffled 1 l flasks and add 1 L, TB broth to each flask. Perform all steps in this section aseptically, next to a Bunsen burner.
Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 milligram per liter (mg/L) (add 1 mL of 50 milligram per milliliter (mg/mL) amp per flask).
Add 20 mL – 25 mL of pre-culture (grown in LB broth) to each flask of TB broth.
Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm until the OD600 measurement is between 0.5 – 0.6 (roughly 3 – 6 hours). Be sure to blank spectrophotometer with cuvette of clean media.
Transfer TB flasks to be On ice .
Add IPTG to a final concentration of 1 millimolar (mM) to each flask ( 1 mL 1 Molarity (M) IPTG per flask).
Shake at 16 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .
Transfer cultures to 1L plastic centrifuge tubes and balance pairs of tubes by adding MilliQ H2O.
Centrifuge cultures in a Beckman Coulter J6-MI centrifuge at 4000 rpm , 00:20:00 , 4 °C . Use blue sleeves to ensure tubes fit snuggly.
Pour off supernatant from cultures.
Add 20 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP to each plastic tube.
Vortex tubes until sample is homogenous. Use a flat-top vortex.

Transfer cell suspension to a 500 ml beaker. Alternatively, lysed cells can be frozen down for later use. Transfer to 5mL tubes and centrifuge at 4,000rpm, 20 minutes, 4°C. Pour off supernatant and freeze pellet at -20°C.
Add solution of tablets + PMSF + DNase to cell suspension.
Place sample in tube of ice with water to hold beaker snugly.
Sonicate sample in cold room.
Rinse tip of sonicator with ethanol, then H 2 O.
Set sonicator to run at 5.5 power setting for 00:05:00 , cycling between 00:00:10, on and 00:00:15, off .
Place 6 plastic ultracentrifuge tubes (with caps) On ice .
Divide sonicated sample between ultracentrifuge tubes. Use scale to match pairs within +/- 0.01 g by adding MilliQ H2O.
Centrifuge samples in Beckman Coulter Avanti J-E centrifuge at 35000 rpm , 00:45:00 , 4 °C .
Filter sonicated sample through bottle top 0.22 μm filter and store On ice .
Add 20 mL Qiagen Ni-NTA resin to yellow gravity column (Econo-Column Chromatography Column) with butterfly valve in 4 °C cold room.
Drain off ethanol storage buffer.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP. (Repeat 4 more times).
Add 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP to Ni-NTA column, mix with pipette.
Transfer Ni-NTA resin to bottle with sonicated/filtered sample and add stir bar. Do not discard yellow gravity column, it will be used again in step 33.
Stir sample in Ni-NTA resin at 4 °C for at least 02:00:00 .
Add sample in Ni-NTA resin back to yellow gravity column.
Drain liquid. Collect flow-through for gel electrophoresis.
Add 50 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Drain liquid. Collect flow-through for gel electrophoresis.
Add 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Add 2 milligram per milliliter (mg/mL) TEV protease (4 eppendorfs of 250 µL lab stock).
Mix sample in Ni-NTA resin well.
Incubate column at 4 °C , Overnight .
Elute Ni-NTA column into 50 ml Falcon tube. Keep On ice . Label as “flow-through.”

Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ). ( Repeat this step 2 more times ). Collect samples into 50 ml Falcon tubes and label with Elution numbers (I.e. label elution #1 this step, elution #2 next, etc.).
Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ).
Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ).
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Pool fractions into 15 ml 50 kDa MWCO Amicon Concentrators.
Centrifuge at 4000 rpm , 4 °C until volume is less than 4 mL .
Transfer to 4 ml 30 kDa MWCO Amicon Concentrator.
Centrifuge until volume is less than 500 µL .
Equilibrate column with 40 mL IEX A Buffer. Run 5 – 10 Column Volumes at 1 – 5 ml/min , using pre-column pressure alarm set to 0.5 MPa .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to detach column.
Draw up 500 µL sample with a 1 ml syringe.
Attach threaded luer lock attachment and remove air from syringe.
Insert new 96 deep well plate into position 3 .
Run SP column gradient program between IEX Buffer A and B to elute.
Collect fractions from chromatogram peak. Concentrate fractions if necessary. Save samples for gel electrophoresis.
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attached S200 10/300 increase column. Use 24 ml column, run at 0.5 ml/min , with 2.8 MPa pre-column pressure.
Manually inject sample into top of 5 ml SP column. Use wet connections and don’t exceed 5 ml/min .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attach column.
Add 500 µL loop to Äkta.
Inject 3 mL SEC Buffer into loop with 5 ml syringe with the red luer lock attachment.
Draw up sample into 1 ml syringe with the red luer lock attachment.
Inject sample (which should be less than 500 µL ) into loop, leaving syringe attached.

Run SEC program. The sample should be injected from the loop. In System Control on the Akta software, go to the menu bar at the top of the page, select Method Editor > New. Under column type, select Gel Filtration. Choose ‘Superdex 200 10/300 Increase’ for the Column type.
Collect fractions from chromatogram. Concentrate as necessary. Save samples for gel.
Aliquot into tubes.
Flash freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at .
Nanodrop protein amount.
Add 200 mL, LB broth to a 500 ml baffled Erlenmeyer flask.
Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 milligram per liter (mg/L) (add 200 µL of 50 mg/ml ).
Add the entire tube of transformed cells to flask.
Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .
Do entire steps of this section near Bunsen burner. Locate 6 glass or plastic baffled 1 l flasks and add 1 L, TB broth to each flask.
Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 mg/ml (add 1 mL of 50 mg/ml amp per flask).
Add 20 mL – 25 mL of pre-culture (grown in LB broth) to each flask of TB broth.
Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm until OD600 measurement is between 0.5 – 0.6 (roughly 3 – 6 hours). Be sure to blank spectrophotometer with cuvette of clean media.
Transfer TB flasks to be On ice .
Add IPTG to a final concentration of 1 millimolar (mM) to each flask ( 1 mL 1 Molarity (M) IPTG per flask).
Shake at 16 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .
Transfer cultures to 1 l plastic centrifuge tubes and balance pairs of tubes by adding MilliQ H2O.
Centrifuge cultures in a Beckman Coulter J6-MI centrifuge at 4000 rpm , 00:20:00 , 4 °C . Use blue sleeves to ensure tubes fit snuggly.
Pour off supernatant from cultures.
Add 20 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP to each plastic tube.
Vortex tubes until sample is homogenous. Use a flat-top vortex.

Transfer cell suspension to a 500 ml beaker. Alternatively, lysed cells can be frozen down for later use. Transfer to 5mL tubes and centrifuge at 4,000rpm, 20 minutes, 4°C. Pour off supernatant and freeze pellet at -20°C.
In a separate beaker, mix together the following reagents:
Add 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Add 8 tablets of ROCHE cOmplete tablets (1 tablet per 20 ml).
Add PMSF to final concentration 0.5 millimolar (mM) ( 800 µL of 100 millimolar (mM) stock PMSF).
Add 8 µL RNase-free DNase (2 μl per 20 ml).
Add solution of tablets + PMSF + DNase to cell suspension.
Place sample in tube of ice with water to hold beaker snuggly.
Sonicate sample in cold room.
Rinse tip of sonicator with ethanol, then H 2 O.
Set sonicator to run at 5.5 power setting for 00:05:00 , cycling between 00:00:10, on and 00:00:15, off .
Place 6 plastic ultracentrifuge tubes (with caps) On ice .
Divide sonicated sample between ultracentrifuge tubes. Use scale to match pairs within +/- 0.01 g by adding MilliQ H2O.
Centrifuge samples in Beckman Coulter Avanti J-E centrifuge at 35000 rpm , 00:45:00 , 4 °C .
Filter sonicated sample through bottle top 0.22 μm filter and store On ice .
Add 20 mL Qiagen Ni-NTA resin to yellow gravity column with butterfly valve in 4 °C cold room.
Drain off ethanol storage buffer.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP. (Repeat 4 more times).
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Wash with 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Add 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP to Ni-NTA column, mix with pipette.
Transfer Ni-NTA resin to bottle with sonicated/filtered sample and add stir bar. Do not discard yellow gravity column, it will be used again in step 33.
Stir sample in Ni-NTA resin at 4 °C for at least 02:00:00 .
Add sample in Ni-NTA resin back to yellow gravity column.
Drain liquid. Collect flow-through for gel electrophoresis.
Add 50 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Drain liquid. Collect flow-through for gel electrophoresis.
Add 10 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP.
Add TEV protease (4 eppendorfs of high conc. lab stock).
Mix sample in Ni-NTA resin well.
Incubate column at 4 °C , Overnight .
Elute Ni-NTA column into 50 ml Falcon tube. Keep On ice . Label as “flow-through.”

Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ). ( Repeat this step 2 more times ). Collect samples into 50 ml Falcon tubes and label with Elution numbers (I.e. label elution #1 this step, elution #2 next, etc.).
Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ).
Wash column with 10 mL Elution Buffer ( 500 millimolar (mM), imidazole ).
Pool fractions into 15 ml 50 kDa MWCO Amicon Concentrators.
Centrifuge at 4000 rpm , 4 °C until volume is less than 4 mL .
Transfer to 4 ml 30 kDa MWCO Amicon Concentrator.
Centrifuge until volume is less than 500 µL .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attach column. Use a 5 ml SP Column , Screw the bottom of column into top Äkta port, making sure to use wet connections. Use pre-column pressure alarm set at 0.5 MPa .
Equilibrate column with 40 mL IEX A Buffer. Run 5 – 10 Column Volumes at 1 – 5 ml/min , using pre-column pressure alarm set to 0.5 MPa .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to detach column.
Draw up 500 µL sample with a 1 ml syringe.
Attach threaded luer lock attachment and remove air from syringe.
Manually inject sample into top of 5 ml SP column. Use wet connections and don’t exceed 5 ml/min .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attach column.
Insert new 96 deep well plate into position 3 .
Run SP column gradient program between IEX Buffer A and B to elute.
Collect fractions from chromatogram peak. Concentrate fractions if necessary. Save samples for gel electrophoresis.
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attached S200 10/300 increase column. Use 24 ml column, run at 0.5 ml/min , with 2.8 MPa pre-column pressure.
Add 500 µL loop to Äkta.
Inject 3 mL SEC Buffer into loop with 5 ml syringe with the red luer lock attachment.
Draw up sample into 1 ml syringe with the red luer lock attachment.
Inject sample (which should be less than 500 µL ) into loop, leaving syringe attached.
Run SEC program. Should inject sample from loop.
Collect fractions from chromatogram. Concentrate as necessary. Save samples for gel.
Nanodrop protein amount.
Aliquot into tubes.
Flash freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at .
Prepare Lysis Buffer + TCEP (final volume 160mL): The recipe for Lysis Buffer per 20mL of volume is: 1 Roche cOmplete protease inhibitor tablet 2uL DNase (RNase free) 0.5mM PMSF final concentration
Add 8 Roche cOmplete protease inhibitor tablets.
Add 16 µL DNase (RNase free).
Add PMSF to a final concentration of 0.5 millimolar (mM) ( 800 µL of 100 millimolar (mM) stock PMSF).
Add TCEP to a final concentration of 0.5 millimolar (mM) ( 80 µL of 1 Molarity (M) stock TCEP).
Prepare IEX Buffer A, using MilliQ water as solvent:
Add 50 millimolar (mM) HEPES ( pH 7.5 ).
Add 500 millimolar (mM) NaCl.
Add 10 % volume glycerol.
Add TCEP to final concentration 0.5 millimolar (mM) .
Prepare IEX Buffer B, using MilliQ water as solvent:
Add 50 millimolar (mM) HEPES ( pH 7.5 ).
Add 2 Molarity (M) NaCl.
Add 10 % volume glycerol.
Add TCEP to final concentration 0.5 millimolar (mM) .
Run Äkta at 0.25 ml/min to attach column. Use a 5 ml SP Column , Screw the bottom of column into top Äkta port, making sure to use wet connections. Use pre-column pressure alarm set at 0.5 MPa .
Fill to final volume of 160mL using MilliQ water.
